description: PeerTube is open-source software for running a federated video hosting platform. Each installation exposes its own API and federates with other ActivityPub-compatible services.
summary: joinpeertube.org documents a tenant-hosted PeerTube REST API with an OpenAPI spec and OAuth-derived Bearer authentication; it also documents CLIs and embed/plugin APIs, but those are product/runtime interfaces rather than separate public surfaces on joinpeertube.org itself, and no GraphQL or MCP server was found.
